mapper.select: SELECT r.test_id, r.student_username as studentUsername, u.full_name AS fullName, t.test_name AS testName, r.score, r.percentile, r.rank, r.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM results r JOIN users u ON r.student_username = u.username JOIN tests t ON r.test_id = t.test_id ORDER BY r.submitted_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO results(test_id, student_username, score, percentile, rank, submitted_at) VALUES (#{testId}, #{studentUsername}, #{score}, #{percentile}, #{rank}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND student_username = #{studentUsername}
